name: h33-mcp
description: H33 post-quantum substrate, FHE biometric auth, ZK-STARK proofs, triple-key signing, BotShield, HICS cryptographic scoring, HATS Tier 1 governance, and Bitcoin UTXO quantum insurance — exposed as MCP tools for AI coding agents.

required_env.name: H33_AGENT_TOKEN
required_env.description: Short-lived cka_* agent capability token. Mint via `h33 mint`. NEVER pass a ck_live_* server key here — the server will refuse to start.

optional_env.name: H33_API_BASE
optional_env.description: Override the H33 API endpoint. Defaults to https://api.h33.ai.

tools.name: h33_substrate_enroll
tools.description: Register a new attestation domain on the H33 substrate

tools.name: h33_substrate_verify
tools.description: Verify a 74-byte substrate commitment against its on-chain anchor

tools.name: h33_substrate_attest
tools.description: Attest a payload with three-family PQ signatures (Dilithium+FALCON+SPHINCS+)

tools.name: h33_substrate_list_domains
tools.description: List substrate domains for the calling tenant

tools.name: h33_substrate_anchor_ai_inference
tools.description: Anchor an AI inference (model id + prompt hash + output hash) to the substrate

tools.name: h33_tenant_read
tools.description: Read the calling tenant's profile

tools.name: h33_tenant_read_usage
tools.description: Read the calling tenant's usage / quota

tools.name: h33_audit_read
tools.description: Read recent audit log entries for the calling tenant

tools.name: h33_meta_detection_rules
tools.description: Fetch the latest H33 detection rules (YAML)

tools.name: h33_meta_get_manifest
tools.description: Fetch the H33 agent manifest

tools.name: h33_hics_scan
tools.description: Run an HICS scan on a codebase and return a numeric improvement score

tools.name: h33_hics_badge
tools.description: Generate the substrate-anchored HICS badge for a PR or release

tools.name: h33_biometric_enroll
tools.description: Enroll a biometric template under fully-homomorphic encryption

tools.name: h33_biometric_verify
tools.description: Verify a probe biometric against an FHE-encrypted template

tools.name: h33_zk_prove
tools.description: Generate a ZK-STARK proof for a statement

tools.name: h33_zk_verify
tools.description: Verify a ZK-STARK proof

tools.name: h33_triple_key_sign
tools.description: Sign a document with Dilithium + FALCON + SPHINCS+

tools.name: h33_triple_key_verify
tools.description: Verify a triple-key signature

tools.name: h33_botshield_challenge
tools.description: Issue a BotShield post-quantum challenge

tools.name: h33_botshield_verify
tools.description: Verify a BotShield response

tools.name: h33_bitcoin_attest
tools.description: Attest a Bitcoin UTXO with three-family PQ sigs and anchor a 74-byte commitment for OP_RETURN

tools.name: h33_bitcoin_verify
tools.description: Verify a previously-issued Bitcoin UTXO attestation (public endpoint, no auth)

tools.name: h33_bitcoin_lookup
tools.description: Look up any H33 attestations for a given UTXO (public endpoint, no auth)
